description: Welcome to Denby – where luxury meets lifestyle in one of the best locations in the complex. This meticulously maintained duplex-style townhome offers 3,000+ sq. ft. of elegant living, with a the primary bedroom and laundry on the main floor, allowing for true one-level living. Enjoy a private backyard facing the peaceful ALR greenbelt and the quiet of this ideal north-side location, well away from Fraser Hwy. Inside, you'll find 4 spacious bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and premium features throughout, including air conditioning and power blinds. The home shows like new, with an open-concept layout, high ceilings, and quality finishes. A perfect blend of space, style, and convenience in a sought-after community.
